sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72953" key="o)lhqei/s" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀληθείς·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀδυνηθείς,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλήθη·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καὶ τὰ ὅμοια,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
